data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having a quote or proposal before booking. However, the evidence provided only confirms that a booking was made without any indication that a quote was issued beforehand. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary condition of providing a quote prior to booking is not met, as evidenced by the lack of any mention of a quote in the prior steps or linked use cases.
gaps: No evidence of a quote or proposal being provided before the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
